name: Dirt Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pudding according to package directions, reducing milk to 1 cup.
2. Fold in the whipped topping.
3. Stir in two-thirds of the cookies and all the marshmallows.
4. Spoon into the crust.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cookies on top.
6. Decorate with gummy worms.
7. Freeze until firm, about 4 hours.
8. Remove from the freezer 10 minutes before serving for easy slicing.
